title: lidbeckia stricta
intro: Lidbeckia stricta, also known as the stiff lidbeckia or stiff yellow daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic actions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, Lidbeckia stricta is often used as a decoction or infusion, and is also employed in the form of tinctures and ointments to harness its therapeutic properties.
